rules: Public post URL writeback is the first gate; KPI source checks are not valid before it.
Zero values are acceptable only as checked zeroes with source proof.
The minimum KPI set is site_clicks, quiz_starts, and quiz_completions.
Weekly review remains closed while emptyData is true.
Keep commerce and product decisions locked until first-batch KPI rows exist.

steps.release: All three first-batch posts have real public HTTPS post_url values.
steps.stop: Do not continue with KPI proof while post_url fields are blank, scheduled-only, private, or placeholders.

steps.release: Each platform row has checked-source proof for site_clicks, quiz_starts, and quiz_completions.
steps.stop: Do not treat zero as data until a named analytics source has actually been checked.

steps.release: All first-batch rows include checked minimum KPI values.
steps.stop: Do not write estimates, drafts, or unverified copied counts.

steps.release: Generated launch, KPI, weekly, and handoff docs reflect the written KPI rows.
steps.stop: Do not run a decision from stale generated docs.

steps.release: Weekly review is open only after publication, URL proof, and minimum KPI proof all pass.
steps.stop: Do not make product or channel decisions while emptyDataMode is still true.

zeroChecks.source: Cloudflare/Web analytics, platform link analytics, or tracked UTM report.
Funnel event catalog/report, analytics event export, or manual verified source.
Funnel event catalog/report, analytics event export, or manual verified source.

rows.writeCommand: python3 tools/promotion_post_writeback.py update --platform youtube_shorts --task-id publish-lt-s01-iris-silence --status published --published-date 2026-06-14 --post-url <REAL_YOUTUBE_SHORTS_URL> --site-clicks 0 --quiz-starts 0 --quiz-completions 0 --proof-note "<REAL_ANALYTICS_SOURCE_PROOF_NOTE> verified"
rows.proofTemplate:
LoveTypes platform post writeback
platform: youtube_shorts
task_id: publish-lt-s01-iris-silence
status: published
published_date: 2026-06-14
post_url: <REAL_YOUTUBE_SHORTS_URL>
site_clicks: <CHECKED_SITE_CLICKS>
quiz_starts: <CHECKED_QUIZ_STARTS>
quiz_completions: <CHECKED_QUIZ_COMPLETIONS>
proof_note: analytics source checked 2026-06-14 for youtube_shorts/publish-lt-s01-iris-silence
rows.nextAction: Publish the post and replace the placeholder URL with a real public post URL.
